### 👉 Pride in Paradise: The Crystal Room

Location: The Museum @ [10 King St W.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/NyLhFMoBFudPfztp8)

#### 8:30pm-late

* [Delicious DJ](https://www.instagram.com/deliciousdj_/)
* [DJ Divaa](https://www.instagram.com/existentialcowgirl/)
* [DJ UBU](https://www.instagram.com/diegg/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DYNDRTgFgz1/)
